languages.text: {n}Старейшина пятится, прикрывая собой юношу.{/n} "Страх — ничто, ибо вера наша сильна. Смерть — ничто, ибо Император придет за нами..."

languages.text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."

languages.text: {n}Die Älteste macht einen Schritt zurück und bedeckt den jungen Mann mit ihrem Körper.{/n} "Furcht ist nichts, denn unser Glaube ist stark. Der Tod ist nichts, denn der Imperator wird uns erlösen..."
languages.original_text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."

languages.text: {n}L'aînée recule d'un pas, couvrant le jeune homme de son corps.{/n} "La peur n'est rien, car notre foi est forte. La mort n'est rien, car l'Empereur nous délivrera..."
languages.original_text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."

languages.text: {n}长者后退一步，用身体护住年轻人。{/n}"恐惧不算什么，因为我们信仰坚定。死亡不算什么，因为皇帝会拯救我们......"
languages.original_text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."

languages.text: {n}La anciana da un paso atrás, cubriendo al joven con su cuerpo.{/n} "El miedo no es nada, pues nuestra fe es fuerte. La muerte no es nada, pues el Emperador nos librará..."
languages.original_text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."

languages.text: {n}長老は一歩下がり、若者を体で覆った。{/n}「恐れることは何もない。死は何ものでもない。皇帝が私たちを救い出してくださるのだから......"
languages.original_text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."

languages.text: {n}Yaşlı kadın bir adım geri çekilerek vücuduyla genç adamı siper eder.{/n} "Korku hiçbir şeydir, çünkü inancımız güçlüdür. Ölüm hiçbir şeydir, çünkü İmparator bizi kurtaracaktır..."
languages.original_text: {n}The elder takes a step back, covering the young man with her body.{/n} "Fear is nothing, for our faith strong. Death is nothing, for the Emperor shall deliver us..."
